title: Manufacturing Engineer - Indigo Paints - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Indigo Paints - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Indigo Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Indigo Paints:
Indigo Paints is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indigo Paints!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
